title: sweech accounts list shows all account kinds + accounts add apikey
description: `sweech accounts list` shows OAuth + API-key + local entries by default. New filters: `--kind oauth|apikey|local|all`, `--provider <name>`. New flow: `sweech accounts add --kind apikey --provider <name> --key <env-or-stdin> --label <label?>` creates a vault entry independent of any workspace.

context.text: Shipped via commit 565ed15 (worktree T-072) + merge 4afe9bf + restore-merge 56bc563. +218 src/vaultAddApiKey.ts new, +279/-43 src/cli.ts (accounts region only), +534 tests/cli-accounts.test.ts. 30 new tests. Verified --kind / --provider filters + env+stdin+literal+prompt API key sources.

acceptanceCriteria: sweech accounts list shows OAuth + API-key + local entries by default ✓
sweech accounts add --kind apikey creates a vault entry independent of any workspace ✓
